title: Same Stats, Different Graphs: Generating Datasets with Varied Appearance and Identical Statistics through Simulated Annealing

documentArtifact.reason: The paper PDF is not redistributed in this repository; this record is a reviewed transcription, not deterministic PDF-artifact anchoring.

anchor.quote: Each dataset has the same summary statistics to two decimal places.
